---
lang: en
title: "Article Title"
subtitle: "Article Subtitle"

bibliography: ../references/references.bib
# csl: ../references/your-journal.csl  ← uncomment and set path when you have a CSL file
---

```{=latex}
% PDF author block.
\authorname{Author Name}

% Use \\ for line breaks inside the affiliation/contact block.
\authoraffil{Institution Name\\
email@institution.edu\\
\url{https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000}}
```

::: {.content-hidden when-format="pdf"}
::: {custom-style="Centered"}
Author Name
https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000

Institution Name
email@institution.edu
:::
:::

```{=latex}
\begin{articleabstract}
Abstract text goes here.

\medskip\noindent\textbf{Keywords:} keyword one; keyword two; keyword three
\end{articleabstract}
```

::: {.content-hidden when-format="pdf"}
Abstract text goes here.

**Keywords:** keyword one; keyword two; keyword three
:::

# Introduction

# Background

# Discussion

# Conclusion

# References
